school.name: ENKA Schools
school.address: Poligon Mah. Sarıyer Cad. No:121/1, 34460 Sarıyer İstanbul

neighborhoods.name: Çamlıtepe / Hacıosman
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area beside Hacıosman metro station (M2), with local amenities. Sarıyer district.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Hacıosman metro durağının (M2) hemen yanında, yerel olanaklara sahip sakin bir konut bölgesi. Sarıyer.

neighborhoods.name: Tarabya
neighborhoods.desc: Waterfront neighborhood on the Bosphorus with restaurants and a promenade; several former consulate residences. Higher rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Boğaz kıyısında restoranları ve sahil yürüyüşü olan bir semt; eski konsolosluk yazlıkları. Kiralar yüksek.

neighborhoods.name: Kireçburnu
neighborhoods.desc: Small waterfront area in Sarıyer known for seafood restaurants.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de deniz ürünleri restoranlarıyla bilinen küçük bir sahil bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Darüşşafaka
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area by Darüşşafaka metro station (M2). Includes housing compounds such as Gazeticiler Sitesi.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Darüşşafaka metro durağının (M2) yanında konut bölgesi. Gazeticiler Sitesi gibi siteler var.

neighborhoods.name: Emirgan
neighborhoods.oneLiner: Bosphorus village with a large park
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus neighborhood in Sarıyer with Emirgan Park and waterfront restaurants. Higher rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de Emirgan Korusu ve sahil restoranları olan bir Boğaz semti. Kiralar yüksek.

neighborhoods.name: Maslak
neighborhoods.desc: Business and office district. Some gated residential compounds nearby.
neighborhoods.caveat: Limited residential stock in Maslak proper.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Çoğunlukla iş merkezi; arkasında lüks siteler var.

neighborhoods.name: Poligon
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area in Sarıyer close to the school, with lower-cost options.
neighborhoods.caveat: Streets vary; check Google Street View.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de okula yakın, daha uygun fiyatlı seçenekleri olan konut bölgesi.
neighborhoods.caveat_tr: Sokaklar değişken; Google Street View'e bakın.

neighborhoods.name: Reşitpaşa
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area in Sarıyer near Maslak, with lower-cost options.
neighborhoods.caveat: Streets vary; check Google Street View.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de Maslak yakınında, daha uygun seçenekleri olan konut bölgesi.
neighborhoods.caveat_tr: Sokaklar değişken; Google Street View'e bakın.

neighborhoods.name: Yeniköy
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus neighborhood in Sarıyer. Higher rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de güzel bir Boğaz semti. Kiralar yüksek.

neighborhoods.name: İstinye
neighborhoods.oneLiner: Walkable to school; İstinye Park mall
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus neighborhood in Sarıyer with the İstinye Park shopping mall. Walking distance to the school.
neighborhoods.caveat: The walk to school is uphill.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Sarıyer'de İstinye Park AVM'nin olduğu Boğaz semti. Okula yürüme mesafesi.

neighborhoods.name: Baltalimanı
neighborhoods.desc: Small Bosphorus cove between Emirgan and Rumelihisarı; mostly older villas and garden apartments.
neighborhoods.caveat: No metro; infrequent buses; main retail is in Emirgan/İstinye (10–15 min).
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Emirgan ile Rumelihisarı arasında küçük bir Boğaz koyu; çoğunlukla eski villalar ve bahçe daireleri.
neighborhoods.caveat_tr: Metro yok; otobüs seyrek; alışveriş Emirgan/İstinye'de (10-15 dk).

neighborhoods.name: Levent
neighborhoods.oneLiner: Business and shopping hub; M2 metro
neighborhoods.desc: Dense business and shopping area on the M2 metro line, with international restaurants and malls.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: M2 metro hattında, uluslararası restoran ve AVM'lerin olduğu yoğun iş ve alışveriş bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Nisbetiye
neighborhoods.desc: Low-rise residential area between Levent and Etiler, with embassies. Walkable.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Levent ile Etiler arasında, elçiliklerin de olduğu az katlı konut bölgesi. Yürünebilir.

neighborhoods.name: Bebek
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus-front neighborhood in Beşiktaş with a seafront promenade and cafés; established international community. Higher rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ta sahil yürüyüşü ve kafe kültürüyle Boğaz kıyısı semti; yerleşik uluslararası topluluk. Kiralar yüksek.

neighborhoods.name: Etiler
neighborhoods.desc: Residential district in Beşiktaş with restaurants and private schools; established international community.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ta restoran ve özel okullarıyla konut semti; yerleşik uluslararası topluluk.

neighborhoods.name: Esentepe
neighborhoods.desc: Mixed business and residential district near Zincirlikuyu, with high-rise housing and good connectivity (Zorlu Centre nearby).
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Zincirlikuyu yakınında karma iş/konut bölgesi; yüksek katlı konut ve iyi ulaşım (Zorlu yakın).

neighborhoods.name: Balmumcu
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area between Zincirlikuyu and Beşiktaş, near Zorlu Centre.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Zincirlikuyu ile Beşiktaş arasında, Zorlu Center yakınında konut bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Arnavutköy
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus village in Beşiktaş with 19th-century wooden houses and a fishing harbour.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ta 19. yüzyıl ahşap yalıları ve balıkçı limanı olan Boğaz köyü.

neighborhoods.name: Kuruçeşme
neighborhoods.desc: Narrow Bosphorus-front strip in Beşiktaş with restaurants and clubs.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ta restoran ve kulüpleri olan dar bir Boğaz kıyısı şeridi.

neighborhoods.name: Kültür
neighborhoods.desc: Low-rise residential area in the hills between Etiler and the Bosphorus ridge.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Etiler ile Boğaz sırtı arasında az katlı konut bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Rumelihisarı
neighborhoods.desc: Bosphorus neighborhood by the historic fortress and Boğaziçi University; waterfront fish restaurants.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Tarihi hisar ve Boğaziçi Üniversitesi yanında Boğaz semti; sahilde balık restoranları.

neighborhoods.name: Gayrettepe
neighborhoods.desc: Mixed business/residential area connected by M2 metro and metrobüs, with mid-range apartments.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: M2 metro ve metrobüsle iyi bağlantılı, orta segment daireleri olan karma bölge.

neighborhoods.name: Dikilitaş
neighborhoods.desc: Compact residential area between Balmumcu and Beşiktaş centre, near the ferry and metrobüs.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Balmumcu ile Beşiktaş merkez arasında, vapur ve metrobüse yakın kompakt konut bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Akatlar
neighborhoods.desc: Established residential district near 1. Levent with large supermarkets (Migros, CarrefourSA) and parks.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: 1. Levent yakınında büyük marketler (Migros, CarrefourSA) ve parkları olan yerleşik konut bölgesi.

neighborhoods.name: Mecidiyeköy
neighborhoods.desc: Dense, central district and major transit hub (metrobüs, M2 metro, many buses).
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Yoğun, merkezi ve büyük ulaşım merkezi (metrobüs, M2, çok sayıda otobüs).

neighborhoods.name: 19 Mayıs
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area northeast of Mecidiyeköy with everyday infrastructure; mid-range rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Mecidiyeköy'ün kuzeydoğusunda, günlük olanakları olan konut bölgesi; orta segment kira.

neighborhoods.name: İzzet Paşa
neighborhoods.desc: Small residential area near Şişli/Mecidiyeköy with local shops; central.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Şişli/Mecidiyeköy yakınında, yerel dükkanları olan küçük konut bölgesi; merkezi.

neighborhoods.name: Şişli (merkez)
neighborhoods.desc: Commercial centre of Şişli with department stores, private hospitals and consulates; mid-range rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Şişli'nin ticari merkezi; mağazalar, özel hastaneler ve konsolosluklar; orta segment kira.

neighborhoods.name: Teşvikiye & Meşrutiyet
neighborhoods.desc: Upscale residential area near Nişantaşı with boutiques and private clinics; older prestige buildings. Higher rents.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Nişantaşı yakınında butikleri ve özel klinikleri olan lüks konut bölgesi; eski prestijli binalar. Kiralar yüksek.

neighborhoods.name: Harbiye & Halaskargazi
neighborhoods.desc: Central area between Taksim, Nişantaşı and Şişli, with good bus and metro access.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Taksim, Nişantaşı ve Şişli arasında, otobüs ve metro erişimi iyi merkezi bölge.

neighborhoods.name: Abbasağa & Vişnezade
neighborhoods.desc: Hillside residential areas inland from Beşiktaş, with a park, cafés and bars.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ın iç kısmında; parkı, kafeleri ve barları olan yamaç konut bölgeleri.

neighborhoods.name: Beşiktaş (merkez)
neighborhoods.desc: Central, busy district with a ferry terminal, fish market and stadium; strong connectivity (ferry to Asia, metrobüs, buses).
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Vapur iskelesi, balık pazarı ve stadı olan yoğun merkezi semt; güçlü ulaşım (Asya'ya vapur, metrobüs, otobüs).

neighborhoods.name: Cihannüma
neighborhoods.desc: Residential area on the ridge above Beşiktaş with views; about a 10-minute walk down to the centre.
neighborhoods.caveat: The walk back up is steep.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beşiktaş'ın üstünde manzaralı sırtta konut bölgesi; merkeze yaklaşık 10 dk yürüyüş.

neighborhoods.name: Bomonti & Feriköy
neighborhoods.desc: Adjacent residential areas with bars, studios and the Feriköy organic market; M2 access via Osmanbey/Şişli.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Barları, atölyeleri ve Feriköy organik pazarı olan bitişik konut bölgeleri; Osmanbey/Şişli'den M2.

neighborhoods.name: İnönü & Gümüşsuyu
neighborhoods.desc: Steep central areas between Taksim and Kabataş, with Bosphorus views and the Kabataş metrobüs/tram interchange.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Taksim ile Kabataş arasında, Boğaz manzaralı ve Kabataş metrobüs/tramvay aktarmasına yakın dik bölgeler.

neighborhoods.name: Cihangir
neighborhoods.desc: Central Beyoğlu neighborhood known for cafés and an international community; English is widely spoken.
neighborhoods.caveat: Steep streets; older buildings; rents have risen.
neighborhoods.desc_tr: Beyoğlu'nda kafeleri ve uluslararası topluluğuyla bilinen merkezi semt; İngilizce yaygın.
neighborhoods.caveat_tr: Dik sokaklar; eski binalar; kiralar yükseldi.
